.A 72 MeV polarized proton beam of the
SIN injector cyclotron has been used.
The detector system consisted of two Si
detector telescopes mounted on two arms movable
independently in the plane perpendicular to the
polarization direction of the proton beam.
Additional monitor detector was placed at 30.degr. to
the beam in the polarization plane of the protons and
consisted of an Al energy-degrader and two Si detectors
Each detector telescope consisted of a dE-Si detector
of 50 am thickness, an E-Si detector of 3 mm thickness
at E=30. and 50.MeV (no information in the article
